hookText: I use a CRM for my friendships and I'm not sorry about it
mirrorText: I used to forget birthdays. miss life updates. wonder why people stopped reaching out.
enemyText: the truth? being a good friend in 2026 requires a system. pretending otherwise is how you end up alone.
mechanismText: EverReach tracks warmth, suggests messages, and reminds you before someone becomes a stranger.
